description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy designed to resemble a young brown bull or calf, featuring a soft, fuzzy exterior with a light brown body and darker brown accents on the hooves and tail. The toy has a large, rounded snout in a pale beige color, and two prominent, curved cream-colored horns on top of its head. Its face is characterized by oversized, shiny black eyes that give it a gentle and endearing expression. The ears are small and rounded, positioned just below the horns, and the tail ends in a tuft of black fur. The toy is constructed with visible stitching and is filled with a soft, squeezable material, making it cuddly and lightweight. There is a small fabric tag visible near the tail, but no other accessories or clothing are present.
description: A soft, plush brown bull stuffed toy with cream-colored horns, large black eyes, and a fuzzy tail. Its cuddly body and gentle expression make it appealing and huggable.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bull's face with large black eyes, cream horns, beige snout, and both front legs visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, one horn, ear, and the full length of the body and tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, both horns, the fuzzy tail with a black tip, and the back legs.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the side of the face, one horn, ear, and the body with the tail extending behind.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is gentle and endearing, with large, shiny black eyes that give a soft, innocent look. The mouth is neutral, and the plush features create a friendly, approachable appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with both front legs positioned forward and the head slightly raised. The tail extends behind the body, and the horns point upward.
